criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The primary function of the AI-powered utility app, such as chatbot, writing assistant, search engine, etc.

criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The AI capabilities leveraged by the app including NLP, machine learning, image recognition, etc.

criteria.name: User reviews
criteria.description: Summaries of user reviews, indicating user satisfaction, common issues, and overall app performance.
